name: clover
description: Squashed clover: offset-bound bullets trace the polar rose r = cos(2*bearing) at angle bearing+spin, then the finished rotated point is squashed per-axis in the screen frame - a four-leaf clover flattened into an ellipse. (Born as a mis-reading of firedancer's Transform chain, kept because it looks cool.) Needs runtime var access in expressions.

scaleX.description: Horizontal squash factor applied after rotation (screen frame)

scaleY.description: Vertical squash factor applied after rotation (screen frame)

bearingStep.description: Degrees bearing advances per frame (position along the curve)

rotationStep.description: Degrees the whole clover rotates per frame
